notes: v1.14.31 — stars now ANIMATE (no longer stale) + haze made visible. Moved the starfield off the static underlay onto a new dedicated canvas (#pl-stars, first child of pl-stage, behind the planets/globe; class pl-fade so it fades with the scene). Field + 7 hero stars are precomputed once (W/H-independent fractions) and drawn per-frame in the existing rAF via drawStars(clock): every star twinkles on its own sine (varied speed 0.7-2.3 rad/s, depth 0.16-1.0 of base alpha); the 7 hero stars pulse slower/grander — glow radius, spike length, and core all breathe. Nebula rendered ONCE to an offscreen buffer (drawNebula) and blitted each frame (cheap), with alphas tripled (0.045/0.034 -> 0.13/0.10) so the cool-blue + violet clouds actually read. drawUnderlay keeps only the static body/rim/halo. Reduced-motion: drawStars(0) once in resize, frame loop skips it (static field, respected). Verified offline: two frames at t=0.3 vs 2.6 show clear twinkle + hero-pulse variation. block-0 braces unchanged 2760/2760 (JS+markup only). node --check 3/3 + sw.js PASS, balanced, stamps lockstep v1.14.31. Tunables: twinkle depth (0.58+/-0.42), hero pulse (0.55+/-0.45), star ts speeds, nebula alphas, hero positions.
